chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-3038 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.14652/2023. 3. For haring of main case. 18.09.2025 Ms. Wajiha Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General. ------------- This is an old petition of 2023. It was last fixed on 22.03.2024, which is over 1 1⁄2 years ago when a counsel held brief for learned counsel for the petitioner. In the last 1 1⁄2 years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today, despite the lapse of 1 1⁄2 years, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that petitioner has lost interest to pursue this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
